---
title: "Tidy Networks in R Cookbook"
author:
- Eric Leung
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: bookdown::gitbook
description: Manipulating and graphing tidy networks in R
documentclass: book
github-repo: erictleung/tidy-networks-cookbook
link-citations: true
mainfont: Arial
monofont: Courier New
monofontoptions: Scale=0.7
bibliography:
- packages.bib
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
biblio-style: apalike
---

# Welcome {.unnumbered}

This is the website for the **"Tidy Networks in R Cookbook"**.
This book will help you get quickly started to
manipulate, analyze, and visualize graph and network data with R.

In this book, you will find modular and editable bits of code to help achieve
what you want in code.
These "recipes" are also a great starting places for you to then take them and
edit them to your own use cases.
